mapper.select:
SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.ORDER_NO, o.ORDER_DATE, o.ORDER_STATUS, o.PAY_AMOUNT, o.TOTAL_AMOUNT, o.DELIVERY_FEE, o.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, o.POINT_USED, o.RECV_NAME, o.RECV_PHONE, o.ZIP_CODE, o.ADDR1, o.ADDR2, o.DELIVERY_MEMO, m.NICKNAME AS ORDERER_NAME, d.COURIER_NAME, d.TRACKING_NO, d.READY_AT, d.SHIPPING_AT, d.DELIVERED_AT, o.CLAIM_STATUS, o.CANCEL_REASON, o.REFUND_AMOUNT, o.REQUESTED_AT
FROM TB_ORDER o JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = o.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DELIVERY d ON d.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID WHERE o.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND o.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ORDER SET CLAIM_TYPE = 'CANCEL', CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING', CANCEL_REASON = #{reason}, REQUESTED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND ORDER_STATUS = 'PAID' AND CLAIM_STATUS IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID, oi.PRODUCT_ID, oi.PRODUCT_NAME, oi.OPTION_COLOR, oi.OPTION_SIZE, oi.QTY, oi.TOTAL_PRICE, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_REVIEW r WHERE r.ORDER_ITEM_ID = oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REVIEWED FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = oi.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID
SELECT REVIEW_ID FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE ORDER_ITEM_ID = #{orderItemId} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(REVIEW_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_REVIEW
INSERT INTO TB_REVIEW (REVIEW_ID, REVIEW_TYPE, TARGET_ID, MEMBER_NO, ORDER_ITEM_ID, RATING, CONTENT, REG_DATE) SELECT #{reviewId}, 'PRODUCT', oi.PRODUCT_ID, #{memberNo}, oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID, #{rating}, #{content}, SYSDATE FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi JOIN TB_ORDER o ON o.ORDER_ID = oi.ORDER_ID WHERE oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID = #{orderItemId} AND o.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REVIEW r WHERE r.ORDER_ITEM_ID = oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID)
